text: The subject property is identified as Jesse’s Tire Clinic, an owner-occupied automotive tire and repair facility located at 1502 W Market Street in Bloomington, Illinois 61701. The property is classified as Commercial & Retail in nature and is improved with a single-story automotive service building constructed in approximately 1982. The subject is situated on a rectangular parcel containing approximately 13,504 square feet (0.31 acres) and is identified by McLean County Parcel Number 21-05-182-001.
